title: Codex CLI zsh fork execution bypasses sandbox envelope allowing unrestricted filesystem access
description: The try_run_zsh_fork function reconstructs commands for zsh fork execution but discards the sandbox-exec wrapper flags generated by attempt.env_for(). Commands run through the zsh fork path execute with broader filesystem access than the WorkspaceWrite sandbox model intended, allowing processes like setuid binaries to run without sandbox constraints. Found via commit audit of openai/codex: 648a420c 'enforce sandbox envelope for zsh fork execution'.
